creator: llevier@argosnet.com
text:
Hi Edwin,

At 05:20 10/11/2006, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>Please note that PR ports/105358 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.
>
>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/105358

Ok for this patch.

Thanks

Brgrds

Laurent LEVIER
Systems & Networks Security Expert, CISSP CISM
